# People & Style — Bridal Rental Studio
> Karnataka's premier bridal rental studio offering clothing rental, jewellery rental, makeup services and wedding photography in Mysuru and Bangalore.

## Services
- Bridal clothing rental: lehengas, wedding gowns, sherwanis, silk sarees
- Bridal jewellery rental: temple sets, kundan, polki, gold-finish sets
- Bridal makeup: HD, airbrush, traditional and South Indian styles
- Wedding photography: candid and traditional coverage

## Service Areas
- Mysuru, Karnataka
- Bangalore, Karnataka

## Contact
- Phone: +91 91876 68280
- Email: hello@peopleandstyle.in
- Hours: Monday–Saturday 10:00–19:00, Sunday 11:00–17:00
